summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Milícia Digital V3 gaming application - all core features working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Button has unstable animations causing click failures without force=True
ui_bugs.workaround: Use force=True for clicks or disable animations during testing

passed_tests: API health check and all event tracking endpoints
Admin dashboard with analytics, funnel, insights, and events tabs
Initial screen loads with pulsating JOGAR GRÁTIS button
Navigation from home to missions screen
Mission selection and game screen loading
Equipment selection with visual hints (yellow border)
Mission completion with +100 XP and +R$1 credit
PRÓXIMA button advances to next mission correctly
XP and credits persist in localStorage
WhatsApp floating button with credit badge
Mobile responsiveness - all elements properly sized
Error handling for invalid admin credentials
